name: QUALCOMM INC/DE
summary: Qualcomm is a global technology company that develops and commercializes foundational technologies including on-device AI, high-performance computing, and advanced wireless connectivity. It derives revenue from sales of integrated circuit products (Snapdragon and Qualcomm Dragonwing families) and licensing of intellectual property. Its platforms serve handsets, automotive (Snapdragon Digital Chassis), and IoT markets including PCs, XR devices, edge networking, and industrial applications. It operates three reportable segments: QCT (semiconductors), QTL (technology licensing), and QSI (strategic investments).
